title: Balosar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Balosar''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*[[Balosar (species)|'''Balosar''']], a [[Sentience|sentient]] [[species]]
*'''[[Balosar]]''', a [[planet]] in the [[Core Worlds]]
*'''[[Balosar system]]''', a [[Star system|system]] in the Core Worlds

==Legends==
*[[Balosar (species)/Legends|'''Balosar''']], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]
*[[Balosar/Legends|'''Balosar''']], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]
*[[New Balosar|'''New Balosar''']], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]
*[[Balosur|'''Balosar''']], a language of the Balosar species 
*'''[[Balosar system/Legends|Balosar system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the Core Worlds

{{Disambig}}
